{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Titan combat
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion]] needs to be capable of [[Titan combat]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41">''The Captain'', chapter 41</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|"Raion, we need you capable of Titan combat."<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
